programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Adam and Tassy convert a 20-metre-high Northamptonshire water tower into a fun family home with curved walls, slides, secret rooms, a firefighter's pole, a swimming pool and a sky garden.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Paula, who's 84, is referred to St George's for urgent treatment. Derek, who's 74, has had a suspected stroke. Glenn, who's 31, has a suspected abscess in his throat.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on close relationships between parents, children and partners. Nine-year-old Robert, who has a dangerously high heart rate, comes in with his dad.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The helicopter medics battle bad weather in Cumbria to reach injured 70-year-old hill-walker Jenny. Meanwhile, biker Ronald needs urgent treatment after a crash.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics fly to the aid of a teenage mountain biker. A multi-vehicle collision in Bedford results in potentially life-changing injuries. And a man has a cardiac arrest.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Paula, who's 84, is referred to St George's for urgent treatment. Derek, who's 74, has had a suspected stroke. Glenn, who's 31, has a suspected abscess in his throat.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: In Israel, Kate unearths icing sugar's secret ingredient. Jimmy grapples with a team of wrestlers who swear by a mysterious yoghurt called skyr. And Matt deep-dives for edible seaweed.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head to Woking, where their finds include a sidecar to be transformed into a boat, and a water cylinder that Simon thinks could be a trendy lamp.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Herefordshire, Henry Cole finds an old cattle feeder that he wants to turn into a garden bench, and Simon O'Brien plans to turn a vintage seed drill into a trendy dining table.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: First hosts Paul and Flora aim to impress their guests at Silverwood Lodge in Cambridgeshire by taking them punting. But the couple get a grilling about why they don't live in their B&B.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Sue's canine-friendly Seashells Guesthouse in Great Yarmouth, the controversial issues of allowing dogs to sleep in the beds and guests to smoke in the bedrooms cause tensions to rise.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The converted prison cell rooms at The Old Court Guesthouse in Bath leave one claustrophobic guest feeling caged, so host Nancy organises a historical tour and a dip in a thermal spa.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At The Dean B&B in Scotland, Caroline's two acres of gardens and breathtaking views across the Firth of Forth impress her guests. But a fine dining experience leaves some hungry for more.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&Bers meet for one last time to thrash out their feedback, reveal the payments and find out which establishment has been crowned the best value B&B of the week.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host, bargain hunter Heidi, serves up an adventurous Asian menu. But will her cheap meat and a game that mimics her shopping habits satisfy her guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sylvia serves up Mediterranean seafood and Spanish chicken, on a fancy dress 80s night featuring a showstopping Madonna tribute and dance moves nobody was expecting.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Showbiz journalist Benjy serves up airline-inspired grub on a night where he captains a plane taking his guests to Gran Canaria - and his gran is the glam cabin crew.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Guide leader Nicky plans a menu inspired by her dream visit to Asia, on a night featuring complicated cooking, geographical grub and a newspaper fashion show.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Party-loving Mark hosts the final night with a Greek theme, featuring an action-packed obstacle course around his kitchen and an emotional moment.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tim and Jules Anderson host at The Kings Head and Queens Jules in Suffolk, offering their guests a 21st-century party in a 17th-century building. But it isn't to everyone's liking.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Poetry and erotic art are all part of the fun at Gordon and Blossom's Hotel Continental in the Essex port of Harwich. But their breakfast doesn't go to plan.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Following a cleaning crisis, will host Ryan Davies's selection of his own wines be enough to impress the guests at his five-star B&B, Llanerch Vineyard, in south Wales.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Neil and Tracy welcome their rivals to the Whitehall Hotel in Darwen, Lancashire. After touring a paint factory and clashing over previous feedback, tempers fray at dinner.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for one last time to confront their critics and find out how much they've been paid, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples who took their first steps on the property ladder in London. How did they get on after compromising on their favourite areas.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In East Grinstead, Lucy and Lynton are at loggerheads over their three-bed semi. Can Kirstie sort out the disjointed downstairs, or will Phil find a hidden gem.

programme.title: The Orient Express: A Golden Era of Travel
programme.desc: All aboard for an opulent ride through the history of the Orient Express. The train rolls out of Paris and there's a trip to the Moulin Rouge.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on strong women who are in A&E with a range of problems. Georgia, who's 19, has fallen 20 feet while trying to climb through the window of her flat.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode meets families with strong bonds forged through adversity. Retired doctor Patrick is brought to St George's after falling from his horse and being dragged 40 metres.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on strong women who are in A&E with a range of problems. Georgia, who's 19, has fallen 20 feet while trying to climb through the window of her flat.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode meets families with strong bonds forged through adversity. Retired doctor Patrick is brought to St George's after falling from his horse and being dragged 40 metres.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton heads to Spain in pursuit of the perfect tomato. What's the difference between risotto rice and long grain? And why aren't pork scratchings made from British pigs.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry discovers a tractor that hasn't run for years - but it's no problem for restorer Alan, the mechanical medic.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Tiverton, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet petrolhead Roger. Henry turns part of a tornado jet into a table, while Simon transforms a pair of exhaust pipes into trendy lamps.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their rivals to Centery Farm in north Devon. Their sheep-herding activity is hit by rain and fog, so the group herd ducks instead.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to The Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where owner and professional chef Ben Cooke shows his guests how to make gravlax and the vodka-based shot akvavit.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen hosts at his four-star Old Hall House, where the on-site activities include shooting and archery. And guest Sandie makes a surprising revelation to the group.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the competition is to The House of Agnes in Canterbury, run by ex-hotel inspector Sandie. But could Sandie's former job backfire on her.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&Bers meet for one last time to find out how much they've been paid. Only one establishment can take the title of best value for money B&B. Who will it be.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Drinks brand ambassador Dan serves up classic Greek grub, while some of his guests struggle to get a word in..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Computer fanatic Matt hosts the second night, with culinary cock-ups, revelations of scoffing sofas, and sumo shenanigans on the menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog walking entrepreneur Jordanna hosts a Mexican-themed evening featuring culinary compliments, offers of feet-kissing and some unwanted guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jayne - the self-proclaimed number one florist in Hull - gives her guests a taste of Spain with her food, flamenco and fiesta. Tony comes dressed as a matador.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition moves to Doncaster, where Tony serves up some countryside cuisine on a final night featuring hit-and-miss food, dirty cutlery and a wolf-whistling hoo-ha.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Julie Janes and Yvonne Quinsey hope to impress their guests at their African-themed Foxholm B&B in North Yorkshire. Things start harmoniously but soon descend into chaos.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wendy Johnson and John Shields welcome their rivals to their American diner-themed B&B, the Pack Horse, in Lincolnshire, where the guests enjoy an afternoon of horse riding.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Glenwalden B&B in Blackpool, hosts Steve and Sigrid take their guests ballroom dancing, but there are suspicions of tactical behaviour and accusations of back-stabbing.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Expectations are high for Nick and Kate's five-star Winder Hall Country House B&B in the Lake District. But things turn sour when Nick offers a crash course in how a B&B should be run.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's crunch time for the B&Bers as they meet for the last time and are soon squabbling about stolen milk, dusty bathrooms and dirty toilet brushes. But who will be crowned best value B&B.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In London, Phil Spencer catches up with Krystle and Sam, who wanted a fun party pad near the river, and Jason and Jaye, who found Clapham beyond their budget.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Albrighton, we revisit Jamie Lea and Curtis, who were torn over their menace of a terrace. Did Kirstie create some much-needed space, or did Phil find it elsewhere.
